narrative: An Applied ML Engineer at Zoho with 7 years of experience, this candidate has a strong product company background. Their ranking was primarily driven by their verified skill depth. They have a good alignment with the JD, particularly in NLP and Learning to Rank. Their experience at a product-first company like Zoho is also a plus. However, their location in Chennai, outside of the preferred Pune or Noida, is a limitation that affected their overall ranking.
